title: hieracium murorum subsp. sylvularum
intro: Hieracium murorum subsp. sylvularum, also known as wood hawk's beard, is a subspecies of Hieracium murorum, a type of flowering plant in the dandelion family. It is primarily found in the woodlands and rocky areas of Europe. The medicinal properties of Hieracium murorum subsp. sylvularum include its ability to act as a diuretic and its potential to reduce inflammation. The health benefits associated with this plant include its ability to support kidney function and alleviate symptoms of urinary tract infections, and it has been traditionally used in herbal preparations such as infusions, tinctures, and salves.
